package rulecoverage

func PositiveRawSqlLiteralInService() string {
    ruleID := "raw_sql_literal_in_service"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Literal SQL strings executed from services instead of repositories or query packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
